page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd Kanzen Kaitai Hakusho
text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelion: the Iron Maiden 2nd video game by Comptiq Editorial Department. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 20 June 2003. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/404707120X 

Overview

A guidebook for the game. Complete with a gallery of newly drawn illustrations and illustrations published in various magazines, a summary of all routes, and an interview with Director Ritsuro Hashimoto.

Table of Contents

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4-04-707120-X
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4-04-707120-9
